problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
